name: Nightwing
text: If there are more than 4 tucked cards here, discard all but 4 of those cards. Master Detective — Response: After you cancel any effects of a revealed encounter card, tuck that card under here from the encounter discard pile and draw 2 cards. “We should all live for the moment. It could be our last.”

name: Dick Grayson
text: If there are more than 4 tucked cards here, discard all but 4 of those cards. Setup: Search your deck and discard pile for the Escrima Sticks upgrade and add it to your hand. “A pupil is only as good as his teacher... and I had the best there is.”

name: Batman
text: Reduce the cost to play Batman by 1 for each card tucked under your identity. Response: After Batman enters play, choose to tuck the top card of the encounter deck under your identity or confuse the villain.

name: Escrima Sticks
text: Restricted. Response: After you cancel the boost icons or a “Boost” ability on a boost card, tuck that card under your identity from the encounter discard pile and deal 2 damage to an enemy.

name: Flying Trapeze
text: Nightwing gets +1 THW and gains the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Response: After you tuck a card under Nightwing, ready him. “He'd fly through the air with the greatest of ease...”

name: Attacrobatics
text: Hero Interrupt (attack): When a boost card is turned faceup, discard Attacrobatics → cancel the boost icons on that card. Deal 1 damage to the villain for each boost icon canceled this way. “You think I'm letting you walk away?”

name: Grappling Hook
text: Hero Interrupt: When you reveal a treachery, discard Grappling Hook → cancel the effects of that treachery and discard it. “Whenever someone asked what power they wish they had, flying is always at the top of my list... but I have to admit, I've learned to love falling too.”

name: Ready for Anything
text: Hero Interrupt: When you reveal a card from the encounter deck, cancel all of its effects and discard it. Hero Action: Ready Nightwing. “Huh, I'm just too damn good at this.”

name: Untouchable
text: Hero Interrupt (defense/thwart): When a boost card is turned face up while an enemy attacks, cancel all icons ([star] and [boost]) on that card (including any “Boost” effects). Then, remove 1 threat from among schemes in play for each icon canceled this way.

name: Nightstrike
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Escrima Sticks → deal 4 damage among enemies in play and discard up to 4 cards tucked under Nightwing. This attack deals 1 additional damage for each icon ([boost] or [star]) discarded this way.

name: Oracle
text: Your identity gains the [[spy ]]trait. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Oracle→ tuck the top card of the encounter deck under Dick Grayson. Heal 1 damage from Dick Grayson. “Oracle and Nightwing. Batgirl and Robin. Dick and Babs. Forever.”
